description_long: This is a heavy-duty pipe wrench with a robust, metallic head and a thick, cylindrical wooden handle. The head features an adjustable jaw mechanism, with visible gear teeth and a knurled adjustment nut for gripping pipes of various sizes. The metal head is dark gray with signs of wear, and the handle is a polished, medium-brown wood, smoothly tapered for a comfortable grip. The transition between the handle and the head is reinforced with a metallic collar, adding durability. The wrench's jaws are wide and flat, designed for maximum contact with round surfaces, and the adjustment mechanism is clearly visible from the side. The overall construction suggests it is built for strength and frequent use in plumbing or mechanical tasks.
description: A sturdy pipe wrench with a metallic adjustable head and a polished wooden handle, showing signs of use and robust construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flat jaws and the circular adjustment nut, with the handle receding backward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the wooden handle, the metallic collar, and the detailed adjustment mechanism on the head.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the rounded end of the wooden handle and the back of the wrench head.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the handle and the other side of the adjustable jaw, with gear teeth and adjustment nut visible.
attribute_handle_type: wooden straight handle, smoothly tapered, polished surface with a metallic collar at the head junction
attribute_head_type: adjustable pipe wrench head with flat, wide jaws and a knurled adjustment nut, constructed from steel
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: visible signs of wear and surface scratches on the metal head
